title: Data Analysis Agent Action Protocol v1
description: A minimal controller-facing action protocol for a data analysis Agent loop. The model must return either a tool_call action or a final_answer action.

thought.description: A brief reason for this next action. It is used for debugging and trace review, not for direct user display.

tool.description: The tool requested by the model. The controller owns actual execution.

args.description: Arguments for the selected tool. The expected schema depends on the tool value.

examples.thought: 我需要先查看字段和样本，避免猜错列名。
已经知道字段名，可以按品类汇总销售额并生成图表。

args.code:
summary = df.groupby('category')['sales_amount'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
result = summary.to_string()
summary.plot(kind='bar')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig(out_dir / 'sales_by_category.png')

thought.description: A brief reason why the Agent can stop now.

final.description: The final user-facing answer. It should include conclusion, evidence, artifact paths when available, and limitations.

examples.thought: 已经得到汇总结果和图表路径，可以结束。
examples.final: 销售额最高的品类是家电。图表已生成：agent_outputs/sales_by_category.png。需要注意的是，sales_amount 有 3 条缺失记录，本次分析默认忽略缺失值。

code.description: Python analysis code to run in the controller-provided environment. The code should use known columns only.
